race.comment: GLORY OF LOVE (2) showed plenty of dash on debut last start over 1243m at Geelong but found the winner a little too good close to home. Will take a lot from that experience and while there is plenty of depth to this maiden she appeals as the one to beat. PRESTIGE MADDY (7) raced wide without cover throughout so her failure last time out over this distance at Wodonga is worth forgiving. Best figures measure up so she might be a surprise packet. RAINING FIRE (9) has been freshened up since leading for home only to be gunned down late over today's journey at Seymour on 26 April. Placed at all three runs to date. Nicely drawn and should be prominent for a long way. JUSTIBELLA (4) was a month between runs when well held in third over 1200m at Ballarat recently. Fitter and from a good gate is a genuine contender. PACKERS JOURNEY (6) showed promising signs at Stawell last start and is worth including in wider exotics.
